G0.label:
case nil.cons
α : Type u_1
t₁ t₂ : List α
hl : t₁.length = t₂.length
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : [] ++ t₁ = tail✝ ++ t₂ → [] = tail✝ ∧ t₁ = t₂
h : [] ++ t₁ = head✝ :: tail✝ ++ t₂
⊢ [] = head✝ :: tail✝ ∧ t₁ = t₂

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
t₁ t₂ : List α
hl : t₁.length = t₂.length
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : [] ++ t₁ = tail ++ t₂ → [] = tail ∧ t₁ = t₂
h : [] ++ t₁ = head :: tail ++ t₂
⊢ [] = head :: tail ∧ t₁ = t₂
